Article Title: IPL 2026 Playoff Qualification Scenarios: With 5 matches to go, RR hold edge as PBKS and KKR chase the final spot — paths for each team explained
Article Text:
It's advantage RR in IPL 2026 Playoffs race. (Pic credit: IPL)

We look at their paths to qualification:

RR need to beat MI in their last game to ensure qualification. That will leave them with the prospect of a three-way tie for second (with SRH and GT if those teams lose their final games) or a tie for third place with SRH or GT. If they lose against MI, they will have to hope PBKS do not beat LSG

PBKS need to beat LSG to have any chance of qualifying. Even if they do, they will need MI to beat RR. If that happens, the KKR-DC game would determine whether PBKS finish sole fourth or tied for fourth with KKR

KKR need to beat DC. But that alone is not enough. They need MI to beat RR. If that happens, the PBKS-LSG game will decide if KKR finish sole fourth or tied for that spot with PBKS

DC must not only beat KKR, they also need two other results to go their way – LSG beating PBKS and MI beating RR – to even tie for fourth spot with either RR or KKR and CSK. Their net run rate is significantly worse than both, which means the possibility of qualification appears only theoretical

CSK’s situation is even more dependent on other results. They need to beat GT and then hope three other results go their way – LSG beating PBKS, MI beating RR and DC beating KKR. If all of that happens, CSK would tie for fourth spot with RR and DC. Their current net run rate is worse than RR’s but better than DC’s

Poll Is there a realistic chance for CSK to qualify for the playoffs? Yes, if results go their way No, it's unlikely

With five games remaining in the IPL 2026 league stage, LSG and MI are already out of contention for the playoffs while RCB, GT and SRH have qualified. RR are best placed among the others followed by PBKS and KKR. DC and CSK are still in the mix but only mathematically.There are now 32 possible combinations of results, so nothing is for sure yet for any of the five remaining in the race that haven’t qualified.With the playoff race tightening, fans can also use TOI’s IPL Prediction Hub to simulate different match results and check qualification possibilities live.
Article Summary: Rr need to beat mi in their last game to ensure qualification. If they lose against mi, they will have to hope pbks do not beat lsg. Csk's situation is even more dependent on other results. There are now 32 possible combinations of results, so nothing is for sure yet.

Article Title: “Fighting over him”: NFL reporter's claim about Sean McVay's Commanders days puts Dianna Russini back in the spotlight
Article Text:
NFL reporter Sean McVay's claim from Commanders days brings Dianna Russini back into spotlight(Getty)

Robert Littal’s viral Sean McVay comment sparks fresh Dianna Russini buzz



Sean McVay continues to focus on the Los Angeles Rams after offseason headlines

Sean McVay rarely finds himself in the middle of off-field chatter, but that changed again as a viral comment pulled Dianna Russini into the conversation. The Los Angeles Rams coach became a trending topic when reporter Robert Littal shared an old story from McVay’s Washington days.The comment quickly spread across NFL circles because it tied together two well-known media names from that era. While there is no evidence to support the story, fans still shared the clip across social media throughout Wednesday morning.Robert Littal, founder of Black Sports Online, posted the claim on X while discussing Sean McVay’s early coaching years with Washington. McVay worked for the franchise from 2010 to 2016 before the Rams hired him as head coach in January 2017.In the post, Littal wrote: “Fun fact, McVay met his future wife way back when he was working with the Commanders, and Dianna Russini was allegedly fighting over him in a bar.”The comment gained even more traction because Dianna Russini had already spent months in the NFL spotlight following viral rumors tied to Mike Vrabel earlier this offseason. In April 2026, photos of Russini and Vrabel together at a resort in Sedona, Arizona, spread widely across social media and sparked intense speculation about their relationship.However, neither confirmed any affair rumors.Mike Vrabel later publicly dismissed the claims, while Dianna Russini said the viral pictures lacked context. Even so, the story continued to circulate among NFL media circles long before the Sean McVay discussion surfaced online.But in the McVay case, neither Dianna Russini nor Sean McVay responded publicly to the claim. Littal also did not provide details, dates or evidence connected to the story. That left the situation more in rumor territory than actual controversy. Even so, the post spread quickly because McVay’s personal life rarely enters NFL headlines.Away from the social media noise, Sean McVay remains focused on preparing the Los Angeles Rams for the 2026 season. Los Angeles opens the year against the San Francisco 49ers in Melbourne, Australia, one of the NFL’s biggest international matchups this season.McVay already made headlines earlier this week during his appearance on the “Bussin’ With The Boys” podcast, released recently. During the interview, he admitted he regrets the way he handled Jared Goff before the Matthew Stafford trade in 2021.“I didn’t handle that the right way,” Sean McVay said while reflecting on the situation during the podcast episode.That honesty drew praise around the league. But one day later, an old rumor suddenly pushed the Los Angeles Rams coach into a completely different spotlight.
Article Summary: Nfl reporter sean mcvay's claim from commanders days brings dianna russini back into spotlight. The los angeles rams coach became a trending topic when reporter robert littal shared an old story. While there is no evidence to support the story, fans still shared the clip across social media.

Article Title: Prince William, Tom Hanks celebrate as Aston Villa end 30-year trophy drought with Europa League glory
Article Text:
Aston Villa players celebrate with the Europa League trophy. (Pic credit: Uefa Europa League)

Emery’s Europa League magic strikes again



Britain's Prince William, center, celebrates during the Europa League final in Istanbul. (AP Photo)

Aston Villa: From early-season struggles to European glory



Aston Villa finally ended three decades of waiting for silverware as a stunning display inspired by Youri Tielemans and Emiliano Buendía secured a dominant 3-0 victory over SC Freiburg in the Europa League final in Istanbul on Wednesday.It was Villa’s first trophy since the 1996 League Cup and their first major European title since the club’s legendary European Cup triumph in 1982. On a memorable night at the Besiktas Stadium, Unai Emery’s side produced a performance worthy of joining the club’s most celebrated teams.Tielemans broke Freiburg’s resistance with a thunderous volley late in the first half before Buendía curled home a sensational second moments before the break. Morgan Rogers added the third after halftime as Villa swept aside the German side in style.The triumph further cemented Emery’s remarkable reputation in the competition. The Spaniard has now won the Europa League five times, having previously lifted the trophy with Sevilla FC in 2014, 2015 and 2016, and with Villarreal CF in 2021.Emery had dismissed suggestions before the final that he was the “king” of the Europa League, but Villa’s latest European conquest only strengthened that legacy.The celebrations in Istanbul were matched by emotional scenes among Villa supporters, with nearly 20,000 fans turning the stadium into a sea of celebration. Club legends from the iconic 1982 side, including Peter Withe and Dennis Mortimer, watched from the stands as Villa created another historic chapter.Even Prince William and Hollywood actor Tom Hanks , both well-known Villa fans, joined in the celebrations.Villa’s triumph completed a stunning turnaround in a season that began disastrously. Emery’s side went six matches without a win at the start of the campaign and scored only twice during that run.But their fortunes changed dramatically in Europe. A victory over Bologna FC 1909 sparked a remarkable Europa League journey that saw Villa win 13 of their 15 matches in the competition.The final itself perfectly captured Villa’s confidence and attacking flair. Rogers was instrumental throughout, first delivering the cross that allowed Tielemans to smash home from inside the area in the 41st minute.If that strike ignited the Villa celebrations, Buendía’s finish moments later sent them into delirium. Given space outside the box, the Argentine curled a majestic shot into the far corner.Rogers then capped off the unforgettable night in the 58th minute, sliding in to convert Buendía’s cross and spark scenes of joy among the travelling support.For a club that had endured relegations, failed finals and decades of frustration, the long wait was finally over.
Article Summary: Aston villa beat sc freiburg 3-0 in the europa league final in istanbul. Goals from youri tielemans, emiliano buendía and morgan rogers secured victory. It is villa's first trophy since the 1996 league cup and their first major european title since the club's legendary european cup triumph in 1982.

Article Title: 'We could have handled it better': Tamim Iqbal on Bangladesh’s T20 World Cup pull out
Article Text:
Former Bangladesh captain Tamim Iqbal is currently interim president of the Bangladesh Cricket Board (File)

New Delhi:

Excerpt...

How are you adjusting to your new role and how different is it from facing the new ball?

I think in the recent past, the reputation damage Bangladesh cricket has gone through has not been great. In Bangladesh cricket means a lot to people and they take a lot of pride in it. I need to bring that pride back, so that is what I am trying to do. Tamim Iqbal

You spoke about Bangladesh's reputation, do you think Bangladesh pulling out of the T20 World Cup was the wrong call?

FILE - Bangladesh's Rishad Hossain, right, is congratulated by teammate Mahmudullah after dismissing Australia's Travis Head during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup cricket match between Australia and Bangladesh in North Sound, Antigua and Barbuda, Thursday, June 20, 2024. (AP Photo/Lynne Sladky, File)

When did you decide to move to the other side of the table?

Will we see an

India vs Bangladesh

series in the near future after the relations were affected preceding the T20 World Cup?

PUNE, INDIA - OCTOBER 19: Mahmudullah of Bangladesh plays a shot as KL Rahul of India keeps during the ICC Men's Cricket World Cup India 2023 between India and Bangladesh at MCA International Stadium on October 19, 2023 in Pune, India. (Photo by Pankaj Nangia/Getty Images)

I do not think India and Bangladesh cricketing relations have any issues. If there are any, we can always discuss and solve them. I am very hopeful that India will travel to Bangladesh later this year. Tamim Iqbal

The Test series win against Pakistan. First Bangladesh defeated Pakistan away and now at home. How do you rate this win?

Bangladesh Cricket team celebrating their Test series win over Pakistan (X | BCB)

Could you talk about the shift in Bangladesh's mentality, especially in the fast bowling department?

When the fast bowlers started getting success, domestic players and young kids started believing that even in Bangladesh you can become a fast bowler, get success and become a superstar. A lot of credit must go to Mominul Haque and, along the way, coaches like Allan Donald and Ottis Gibson also played a big part Tamim Iqbal

What is the future of cricket with so many global leagues and do you think ODI cricket will find space in this packed calendar, or will the 2027 ODI World Cup be the last?

Bangladesh's Nahid Rana bowls a delivery during the second one day international cricket match between Bangladesh and New Zealand in Mirpur, Bangladesh, Monday, April 20, 2026. (AP Photo/Mosaraf Hossain)

Let’s take the example of

Nahid Rana

. If tomorrow a franchise, which has teams in five or six different leagues, gives a lucrative contract to the youngster and asks him to avoid red-ball cricket and become a globe-trotter, do you think it is easy for youngsters nowadays to focus on international cricket and ignore T20 leagues where they can make ten times more money?

Poll Do you think Tamim Iqbal will successfully improve the image of Bangladesh cricket in his new role? Yes, he has the vision and experience. No, it's a challenging task.

Former Bangladesh captain Tamim Iqbal is embracing a new challenge as Bangladesh Cricket Board’s (BCB) interim president, installed by an ad-hoc committee earlier this year. In a free-wheeling chat with TimesofIndia.com, Tamim speaks candidly about how a heart attack pushed him towards administration, his vision for improving Bangladesh cricket’s image, and the changing dynamics of the global game.The former opener also discusses Bangladesh’s impressive rise in fast bowling, the importance of protecting Test cricket amid the T20 boom, concerns around T20 leagues, and the much-anticipated India-Bangladesh series. Tamim believes Bangladesh pulling out from the T20 World Cup earlier this year, has tarnished the country's reputation and he feels cricket must always come first - - regardless of off-field complications.Very, very different, but this is what I wanted. I wanted to fix things. When I was playing for the last 17-18 years with all my colleagues, the things we were always complaining about as players, I want to fix all those things so that the players do not have those complaints anymore. I know very well that I cannot do everything, but I am pretty sure that I can do enough so that Bangladesh cricket improves in terms of facilities.Batting, bowling or fielding is not my job now. I cannot bat, neither can I bowl, but I am pretty sure that I can help the players by giving them the best possible facilities available so that they can improve by two, three or five per cent. That is what I am aiming for.I think in the recent past, the reputation damage Bangladesh cricket has gone through has not been great. In Bangladesh cricket means a lot to people and they take a lot of pride in it. I need to bring that pride back, so that is what I am trying to do.We could have handled the situation better. We could have had mature discussions and found a way. Cricket should never suffer.The heart attack was the trigger point for me. I had a heart attack last year, when I was trying to make a comeback in the national team. And when I had the heart attack, I thought that was it. After a heart attack, I do not think it was worth it for me because even if I played, I would have only played for another year or two. I have a very young family and maybe I was not ready to come back to cricket.There is a scheduled series against India later this year. I am very hopeful that India will come and play the whole series. This is one bilateral series that the people of Bangladesh really enjoy watching. They come to the ground and there is healthy competition. Bangladesh did really well in the last series against India. Whenever these two nations play, especially when India travel to Bangladesh, it is always very high-intensity cricket.I am very hopeful. Issues will always be there and it is the responsibility of the cricket boards to solve them. We have a new cricket board now, an ad hoc committee has been placed, and I am sure communication and dialogue will happen. At the end of the day, cricket should win. Regardless of anything else, cricket should always win and that is what I am going to work towards.I do not think India and Bangladesh cricketing relations have any issues. If there are any, we can always discuss and solve them. I am very hopeful that India will travel to Bangladesh.If you followed the Test matches against Pakistan, both surfaces were sporting wickets. Bangladesh produced green, grassy wickets in both Tests. That shows the change in mentality. It would have been very easy for Bangladesh to go back to spinning tracks and try to get a series win, but we prepared green tops and that is the change in mentality I want to see in Bangladesh cricket.We need to start doing well at home first, especially in Test cricket. We need to make it a fortress. Yes, we have done well in T20s and ODIs at home, but in Test cricket we still have not ticked that box. Obviously, we also want to win games overseas because the confidence of winning Test matches at home will be massive.I watched this very closely because I was playing at that time. I think a lot of credit should go to then captain Mominul Haque. I still remember in first-class games he used to make sure that the fast bowlers bowled the maximum overs. I remember one first-class game because he and I used to play for the same team, and I went to him and said we could easily bowl spinners. He said, “No, if I do not make these fast bowlers bowl now, how are they going to learn? Regardless of whether they are doing well or not, we need fast bowlers in the national team and they need to bowl as much as possible. ”I think he was the main guy who changed the fast bowling unit. He gave maximum importance to the fast bowlers and made sure that they bowled maximum overs in domestic and international cricket. When the fast bowlers started getting success, domestic players and young kids started believing that even in Bangladesh you can become a fast bowler, get success and become a superstar. A lot of credit must go to Mominul Haque and, along the way, coaches like Allan Donald and Ottis Gibson also played a big part.Cricket’s dynamics have definitely changed.About 50-over cricket, the ODI World Cup is still the biggest event in cricket. Yes, there is a lot of interest in T20 cricket and T20 cricket has been doing really well, but I am sure we need to find a way to balance it out. There are a lot of leagues around the world now. Even associate nations are coming up with T20 leagues.We need to find a way where everything is balanced. If there is ever a discussion on this, I am sure everybody will have their own opinion. At the end of the day, we need to save Test cricket because it is the most respected format and there is still a lot of interest in it. You might not see big crowds in a few countries, but there are still countries where stadiums are packed for Test cricket. We need to make those things a bit more interesting.There is one thing money cannot buy and that is the passion for playing for your country. If that was the case, 80 percent of cricketers could have gone that way. I have the utmost respect for franchise cricket, but when you play for your nation and your country, that is something you cannot buy.Even in your country, superstars can get massive offers, but they still play for the country. These are things that come from your heart when you play for your nation.If I have to compare it with football, players are getting paid millions and millions of dollars, but when there is an opportunity to play for their country, they still go and play. There are certain things money cannot buy and playing for your country will never change. Yes, there will be exceptions and a few cricketers might go that way, but if you ask me about the majority, I do not think that is going to change.
Article Summary: Former bangladesh captain tamim iqbal is currently interim president of the bangladesh cricket board. In a free-wheeling chat with timesofindia.com, tamim speaks candidly about how a heart attack pushed him towards administration. He also discusses bangladesh’s impressive rise in fast bowling, the importance of protecting test cricket amid the t20 boom.

Poll Do you think Ronda Rousey still holds star power in combat sports today? Definitely, she's a legend Somewhat, but fading Not really, new stars have emerged No opinion

Ronda Rousey remains one of the biggest names ever connected to combat sports. People still look for her even after she quit full-time MMA and wrestling because of her UFC dominance, WWE success, acting work, and social media presence. According to projections for 2026, her net worth is close to $14 million.Rousey built her fortune through UFC fight purses, WWE contracts, movie roles, sponsorships, and book sales. She also gained attention for her personal life with husband Travis Browne and their ranch lifestyle away from the spotlight. Her name still stays relevant because she helped change women’s MMA forever and became one of the first female crossover stars in combat sports history.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Rousey made most of her money during her years in UFC and WWE. She became UFC’s first women’s bantamweight champion and quickly turned into one of the promotion’s top attractions. Her paydays grew with every major fight, especially during title defenses and pay-per-view events.After leaving UFC, she joined WWE and became one of the company’s biggest female stars. WWE added another major income stream to her career.Ronda Rousey’s rise started in UFC when she became one of the most dominant fighters in women’s MMA. Her aggressive fighting style and quick finishes made her a huge attraction for fans around the world.Her popularity helped her land endorsement deals with major brands. Companies wanted her image because she became one of the most recognizable female athletes in sports.Hollywood also helped increase her earnings. She appeared in movies and television projects while also releasing books that added extra income outside sports.Ronda Rousey has mostly kept her business life private, but reports say she invested in property and land over the years. She has been connected to homes in California and a ranch called Browsey Acres.The ranch became well known after she shared parts of her daily life online. It also reflects the quieter lifestyle she now prefers after years of global fame.Unlike many celebrities, Rousey does not publicly speak much about stocks or major business companies. Most reports suggest her wealth mainly comes from combat sports, entertainment, endorsements, and property assets.Today, Ronda Rousey lives a calmer life away from regular fighting and wrestling schedules. She spends most of her time with Travis Browne and their family.Lifestyle reports have connected her to vehicles like the Cadillac Escalade, BMW X6, Corvette, and Chevrolet Suburban. She has also been seen wearing luxury watches during public appearances, although exact collections are not officially confirmed.Despite her fame, she now stays more private compared to her UFC peak years.Ronda Rousey changed women’s MMA forever. Before her UFC run, women fighters did not receive the same spotlight as male fighters. Her success helped bring women’s MMA into the mainstream.She became one of the first female fighters to headline major UFC cards and helped open more opportunities for women in combat sports.Her WWE success also proved she could stay relevant outside MMA.Even after retirement from full-time competition, Ronda Rousey’s name still has major value. Media appearances, interviews, sponsorships, book sales, and prospective future WWE appearances will allow her to keep earning.Her long-standing reputation and social media following also assist to maintain endorsement possibilities open. Her name still draws notice all across the world since she has a history in both UFC and WWE.

She also gained attention for her personal life with husband travis browne and their ranch lifestyle away from the spotlight. According to projections for 2026, her net worth is close to $14 million.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Points Table after Match 65: KKR jump to sixth with win over eliminated Mumbai Indians
Article Text:
KKR beat MI by 4 wickets (Pic credit: IPL)

IPL 2026 Points Table after KKR vs MI match

Pos Team P W L NR Pts NRR 1 Royal Challengers Bengaluru (Q) 13 9 4 0 18 +1.065 2 Gujarat Titans (Q) 13 8 5 0 16 +0.400 3 Sunrisers Hyderabad (Q) 13 8 5 0 16 +0.350 4 Rajasthan Royals 13 7 6 0 14 +0.083 5 Punjab Kings 13 6 6 1 13 +0.227 6 Kolkata Knight Riders 13 6 6 1 13 +0.011 7 Chennai Super Kings 13 6 7 0 12 -0.016 8 Delhi Capitals 13 6 7 0 12 -0.871 9 Mumbai Indians (E) 13 4 9 0 8 -0.510 10 Lucknow Super Giants (E) 13 4 9 0 8 -0.702

NEW DELHI: Kolkata Knight Riders kept their IPL 2026 playoff campaign alive with a vital four-wicket victory over Mumbai Indians in a high-stakes clash at the Eden Gardens, climbing to sixth place on the points table. The win took KKR to 13 points from 13 matches, comprising six wins, six defeats and one no-result, along with a net run rate of +0.011 that keeps them firmly in contention for the final playoff spot.For Mumbai Indians, the result only underlined a difficult season. The five-time champions, already knocked out of the playoff race, managed just four wins from 13 games, finishing with eight points and a net run rate of -0.510.At the top of the standings, Royal Challengers Bengaluru have secured the No.1 position with 18 points from 13 matches, winning nine and losing four, and boasting a dominant net run rate of +1.065. They are the first team to officially qualify for the playoffs.Both Gujarat Titans and Sunrisers Hyderabad have also booked their spots in the next stage, finishing with 16 points each and strong net run rates of +0.400 and +0.350 respectively.Rajasthan Royals sit fourth with 14 points from 13 matches (seven wins and six losses) and a net run rate of +0.083. Punjab Kings are fifth with 13 points, supported by a no-result and a healthy NRR of +0.227.KKR, also on 13 points, are locked in a direct battle with Punjab Kings for the final playoff berth, with net run rate separating the two sides and keeping the qualification race finely poised.Just below them, both Chennai Super Kings and Delhi Capitals are eliminated despite finishing on 12 points each, with CSK’s net run rate (-0.016) slightly better than DC’s (-0.871).Apart from Mumbai Indians, Lucknow Super Giants are also officially out of the tournament after a disappointing campaign.
Article Summary: Kolkata knight riders beat mumbai indians by four wickets at the eden gardens. Kkr climb to sixth place on the points table with 13 points from 13 matches. Royal challengers bengaluru have secured the no.1 position with 18 points, winning nine and losing four.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi leapfrogs seven players to reclaim top spot
Article Text:
Vabihav Sooryavanshi leads Orange Cap tally of IPL 2026

Poll Which aspect of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's performance impressed you the most? His explosive strike rate Number of sixes hit

Rank Player Runs Strike Rate 100s / 50s 1 Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (RR) 579 236.32 1 / 3 2 Mitchell Marsh (LSG) 563 163.18 1 / 3 3 Heinrich Klaasen (SRH) 555 155.89 0 / 5 4 Sai Sudharsan (GT) 554 157.83 1 / 6 5 Shubman Gill (GT) 552 160.46 0 / 5

Teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reclaimed the Orange Cap in sensational fashion during the high-voltage IPL 2026 clash between Rajasthan Royals and Lucknow Super Giants. Chasing a daunting target of 220, the 15-year-old unleashed a breathtaking assault, smashing 93 runs to take back the lead in the tournament’s run charts.Earlier in the evening, Mitchell Marsh had briefly overtaken him after hammering a stunning 96 for LSG in the first innings. Marsh has enjoyed a remarkable season, piling up 563 runs in 13 innings and holding the Orange Cap in 1st innings. But Sooryavanshi responded in style, lifting his tally to 579 runs and reclaiming the prestigious cap. Before the match against Lucknow Super Giants, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was in 8th position on the IPL 2026 Orange Cap leaderboard with 489 runs in 12 innings. His explosive 93-run knock against LSG added to his tally, helping him leapfrog seven players, including Heinrich Klaasen and Sai Sudharsan, to reclaim the number one spot.What makes Sooryavanshi’s campaign even more extraordinary is the manner in which he has scored his runs. The RR youngster is striking at a staggering rate of 236.32, one of the most explosive seasons in IPL history. He has also smashed 53 sixes this season, leaving him on the verge of breaking the all-time record for most sixes in a single IPL edition which is held by Chris Gayle (59).Adding another milestone to his unforgettable season, Sooryavanshi became the first Indian batter in IPL history to hit 50 sixes in a single campaign.Here are the top 5 leading run-scorers in IPL 2026 after Match 64 (RR vs LSG)Following Match the match, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi sits atop the IPL 2026 run charts with 579 runs at a staggering strike rate of 236.32, including one century and three fifties. Close behind him is Mitchell Marsh of LSG, who has amassed 563 runs at a strike rate of 163.18, with one hundred and three half-centuries to his name. Heinrich Klaasen occupies the third spot with 555 runs at 155.89, including five fifties for Sunrisers Hyderabad. Gujarat Titans duo Sai Sudharsan and Shubman Gill complete the top five with 554 and 552 runs respectively. Sudharsan has registered one century and six fifties at a strike rate of 157.83, while Gill has scored five fifties at an impressive strike rate of 160.46.Also See IPL Records
Article Summary: Vabihav sooryavanshi leads orange cap tally of ipl 2026 after match 64. The 15-year-old smashed 93 runs to take back the lead in the tournament’s run charts. Mitchell marsh had briefly overtaken him after hammering 96 for lsg in first innings.

Article Title: “Let’s dance”- Carlos Prates confident of Islam Makhachev’s UFC welterweight title, calls out Ilia Topuria for a bout after KO win at UFC Perth
Article Text:
Carlos Prates (via Getty)

Carlos Prates says he is ready to wait for his UFC title opportunity

Carlos Prates believes he has done enough to earn the next UFC welterweight title shot after his latest knockout victory at UFC Perth. The Brazilian fighter stopped former champion Jack Della Maddalena in the third round earlier this month and extended his incredible UFC run. Prates now has seven wins, seven finishes, and seven performance bonuses from eight fights inside the promotion. His dominant form has quickly pushed him into the title picture at 170 pounds.Following the win, Prates openly spoke about his future and suggested that the UFC could already have plans for him. The rising contender said he expects to challenge the winner of the rumored welterweight title fight between Islam Makhachev and Ian Machado Garry. Although the UFC has not officially confirmed that matchup, reports continue to link the fight to a major event later this year. Prates now appears ready to wait patiently for his opportunity to compete for championship gold.Carlos Prates recently told Ariel Helwani that he remains highly confident about getting the next shot at the welterweight title. According to the Brazilian, he had important discussions with UFC officials after his victory over Jack Della Maddalena.While he did not reveal full details, he hinted that those conversations gave him strong belief that he is next in line for the belt.The dangerous striker said he expects Islam Makhachev and Ian Machado Garry to fight first, and he plans to face the winner afterward. Prates added that the result of that fight does not matter to him because he feels prepared to compete against either man for the championship.There is still uncertainty around the timeline for his title opportunity. Makhachev has usually fought only once every several months in recent years. That could force Prates to stay inactive for a long period if he waits for the title fight. However, the Brazilian believes the extra time could actually help him improve as a fighter. He explained that the break would allow him to recover from injuries, sharpen his skills in training camp, and become even stronger before competing for the belt.Another possible obstacle in the division is lightweight champion Ilia Topuria. Many fans believe Topuria could move up to welterweight if he defeats Justin Gaethje in his next fight. But Prates does not expect that to happen immediately. He believes Topuria will continue fighting at lightweight first, possibly against Arman Tsarukyan.Prates also made it clear that he would welcome a future fight against Topuria if both eventually become champions. The Brazilian confidently stated that once he captures the welterweight belt, he would gladly invite Topuria to move up and challenge him at 170 pounds.
Article Summary: Carlos prates believes he has done enough to earn the next ufc welterweight title shot. The brazilian fighter stopped former champion jack della maddalena in the third round earlier this month. Prates now has seven wins, seven finishes, and seven performance bonuses from eight fights inside the promotion.

Article Title: Buffalo Sabres goalie Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen smashes mask after heartbreaking NHL Game 7 playoff elimination defeat
Article Text:
Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen #1 of the Buffalo Sabres defends the net against the Montréal Canadiens during the first period in Game Seven of the Second Round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs at KeyBank Center on May 18, 2026 in Buffalo, New York. (Photo by Joe Hrycych/Getty Images)

Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen reaction after Buffalo Sabres Game 7 defeat

The Buffalo Sabres’ painful NHL playoff exit after a crushing Game 7 loss is drawing plenty of attention for goalie Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen’s emotional reaction immediately following the final buzzer. Cameras caught the frustrated netminder slamming his goalie mask near the bench after the season-ending loss.The drama became one of the biggest topics of conversation in NHL news circles. The loss also stirred chatter about Buffalo’s crowded goaltending situation between Alex Lyon and Devon Levi heading into the offseason and potential NHL trade rumours.Ukko-Pekka Luukkonen was emotional after the Buffalo Sabres were eliminated from the NHL playoffs in Game 7.The Finnish netminder was the star of the game, stopping several key shots as Buffalo’s bid for the postseason was foiled by a late goal. On television cameras, Luukkonen was seen smashing his mask in frustration as players skated off the ice shortly after the final whistle.The incident immediately went viral across social media platforms and was featured in the latest NHL news roundup. Many fans interpreted the reaction as a sign of how crushing the playoff loss was for the Sabres roster after a gruelling postseason run.Buffalo came into the playoffs with a lot of expectations, having steadily improved throughout the regular season. But then the team wasn't good enough to go to the later rounds of the Stanley Cup quest, even if they played well for most of the series.Luukkonen’s emotional reaction also underscored the pressure NHL goaltenders face in elimination games.The Game 7 loss may now force the Buffalo Sabres to make some major offseason decisions regarding their goalie rotation and long-term roster plans. Devon Levi NHL trade rumours persist, with Buffalo currently having multiple goaltenders under contract.Insiders from around the league believe the organization could look to make a trade in the summer to increase playing time and solidify the team's future depth chart. The ending was painful, but Luukkonen and the Sabres figure to be key names in NHL updates throughout the offseason.
Article Summary: Ukko-pekka luukkonen was emotional after the buffalo sabres were eliminated from the nhl playoffs in game 7. Cameras caught the frustrated netminder slamming his goalie mask near the bench after the season-ending loss. The incident immediately went viral across social media platforms and was featured in the latest nhl news roundup.

Article Title: $2.2 billion Nissan Stadium set to redefine the Super Bowl experience during NFL 2030 in Nashville
Article Text:
Nissan Stadium is all set to be an “extraordinary viewing experience” for Super Bowl LXIV

Over $2 billion is being spent to build Nissan Stadium

NFL 2030 might be four years away, but a new venue has already been selected for Super Bowl 2030.As per reports, the city of Nashville, Tennessee, has now been selected for the first time since 2019 as teams gear up to play at the Nissan Stadium.In the last few hours, as per reports, NFL commissioner Roger Goodell issued a statement about the new venue.The statement read as, "The 2019 NFL draft in Nashville was one of the great fan events in our history…”The statement added, “Super Bowl LXIV at the new stadium is the next step in this remarkable football journey."The statement continued, "This is the next great step in a remarkable football journey, and a great community in Nashville. We can't wait to be there…”NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell added, "It's going to be an absolutely spectacular event."Super Bowl LXIV is all set to be played at the Nissan Stadium which is currently being built.As per Broncos Wire, the stadium is reported to be ready for games next year as Nashville gears up to host Super Bowl 2030 in the stadium’s third season.A whopping $2.2 billion is currently being spent to build the Nissan Stadium in Nashville as the website promises to be an “extraordinary venue”.As per reports, the building will be featuring high tech ETFE translucent roof which will help players and fans to take shade from the harsh weather.Interestingly, Nissan Stadium is also set to be the smallest stadium in the league with only 60,000 seats but the website promises a “close viewing experience” for all fans.A statement from the website of the Nissan Stadium reads as, "Say goodbye to the 'nosebleed seats' -- they don’t exist here…”The statement added, “This stadium offers the closest viewing experience of any NFL stadium with seats that are 38 percent closer to the field than the current Nissan Stadium."The next Super Bowl is all set to be held in Inglewood, California, on February 14, 2027, at SoFi Stadium, while Atlanta will host the NFL's championship game in 2028.
Article Summary: Nissan stadium is all set to be an “extraordinary viewing experience” for super bowl lxiv. Over $2 billion is being spent to build nissan stadium in nashville, tennessee. Nfl commissioner roger goodell issued a statement about the new venue.

Article Title: NYT Connections hints and answers today, May 18, 2026
Article Text:
What is NYT Connections?

NYT Connections hints for May 18, 2026



Yellow: These words sound identical despite different meanings

Green: Think of things breaking, bursting or coming apart

Blue: Remove the mascot and keep the team name singular

Purple: Rearranging the letters reveals something edible

NYT Connections answers for May 18, 2026

Yellow category — Homophones

Green category — Rupture

Blue category — MLB teams in singular form

Purple category — Anagrams of fruits

Why today’s puzzle felt tricky

Why NYT Connections remains so popular





The New York Times continues to expand its digital puzzle empire with NYT Connections, a daily challenge that tests vocabulary, pattern recognition and lateral thinking. Puzzle #1072 for May 18, 2026 offers another mix of straightforward associations and deceptive wordplay, forcing players to look beyond obvious meanings. While some groups are relatively easy to spot, others rely on pronunciation tricks and hidden relationships between words. As always, the game rewards patience, careful observation and the ability to connect seemingly unrelated terms.NYT Connections is one of the most popular daily word games published by The New York Times. The puzzle presents players with a grid of 16 words that must be sorted into four groups of four based on a shared connection.The categories can range from simple themes such as colours, foods or actions to more complex wordplay involving homophones, double meanings and hidden references. Each category is colour-coded by difficulty, with yellow generally being the easiest and purple usually the trickiest.Players must identify all four categories without making too many mistakes, making the puzzle both a vocabulary test and a logic challenge.Need a few clues before revealing the full solutions? Here are some spoiler-light hints for today’s NYT Connections puzzle #1072:Today’s puzzle leans heavily into pronunciation and word associations, meaning some answers may appear unrelated until players focus on how the words sound rather than what they mean.Here are the confirmed answers and categories currently available for today’s puzzle:PAIRPAREPEARPÈREBLOWCRACKPOPSPLITPADREREDROYALTWINCHEAPEARPLUMPWIKIThe yellow category focused on words associated with breaking or bursting apart, while the green category revolved around homophones, words that sound alike despite having different spellings and meanings.One of the biggest challenges in today’s puzzle was separating words based on sound rather than definition. The homophone category in particular may have confused players because the words appear unrelated at first glance.The inclusion of “PÈRE,” the French word for “father,” added another layer of difficulty because many players may not immediately recognise it as sounding similar to “pair,” “pare” and “pear.”Meanwhile, the rupture category relied on action-based vocabulary that could easily overlap with other possible themes, increasing the likelihood of incorrect guesses.Since its launch, NYT Connections has become one of the fastest-growing word games online, joining other successful The New York Times Games titles such as Wordle, Spelling Bee and the Mini Crossword.Part of the game’s popularity comes from its balance between accessibility and difficulty. The rules are simple enough for casual players to understand quickly, but the layered wordplay keeps even experienced puzzle fans engaged.The puzzle’s social media popularity has also grown rapidly, with players frequently sharing streaks, reactions and category debates online after each daily release.
Article Summary: Nyt connections is one of the most popular daily word games published by the new york times. The puzzle presents players with a grid of 16 words that must be sorted into four groups of four based on a shared connection. Each category is colour-coded by difficulty, with yellow generally being the easiest and purple usually the trickiest.

Article Title: IPL 2026 | 'Playing for pride?' Hardik Pandya's response to Ravi Shastri during toss goes viral
Article Text:
Ravi Shastri and Hardik Pandya (BCCI/IPL Photo)

Playing XIs:

Here are the Impact substitutes for both the teams:

NEW DELHI: Kolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane won the toss and opted to bowl first against Mumbai Indians in their crucial IPL 2026 clash at Eden Gardens in Kolkata on Wednesday.KKR went unchanged from their previous game, while Mumbai received a major boost with skipper Hardik Pandya returning to the playing XI after missing matches due to injury. Suryakumar Yadav also returned to the side.With 11 points from 12 matches, KKR need a victory to keep their playoff hopes alive. Mumbai Indians, meanwhile, are already out of contention for a place in the final four.“We are looking to bowl first. (They need two wins out of two) Yes, absolutely. It's as simple as that. We just want to focus on this game. We played really good cricket overall last game against GT. As you've mentioned, we need to win two out of two, but staying in the moment, playing good cricket over the course of 40 overs, it's really important,” Rahane said at the toss.Reflecting on KKR’s up-and-down campaign, Rahane added: “(See-saw season) Yeah, I think the first half of the tournament, there were moments that we could have capitalized and the things could have been different, but again, no complaints, no regrets. The way we came back, the way we pulled off things, and the confidence amongst the group was amazing. The atmosphere in the dressing room was really good. It's always about the comeback.It's always about being in the moment and how can you come back, how can you do well for the team. And guys have been fantastic. (About the pitch) It's frankly tough to read the wicket, but as I said, we need to play good cricket throughout 40 overs, and then see what happens. We are going with the same team.”During the toss presentation, former India head coach Ravi Shastri asked Pandya whether Mumbai Indians were now playing only for pride after being knocked out of the tournament.Responding to that, Pandya said: “We would have bowled first as well. Looks like a track which has been under the covers. Just wanted to see how exactly it plays out.”On MI’s approach for the remaining games, Pandya said: “(Playing for pride) Absolutely. Every game you play, you want to win. You want to play your best cricket, put the best foot forward. At the same point of time, Mumbai Indians have a long history of winning titles. So just want to make sure that we keep the head high and make sure that we represent Mumbai Indians in the best capacity. (Good record here) Yes, but that's in the past. We still need to turn up, play some good cricket and enjoy. (Changes?) I'm back. Gaza is back and I think, yeah, just two changes.”Mumbai Indians (Playing XI): Ryan Rickelton(w), Rohit Sharma, Naman Dhir, Suryakumar Yadav, Tilak Varma, Hardik Pandya(c), Will Jacks, Corbin Bosch, Deepak Chahar, Jasprit Bumrah, Raghu SharmaKolkata Knight Riders (Playing XI): Ajinkya Rahane(c), Angkrish Raghuvanshi(w), Cameron Green, Rovman Powell, Manish Pandey, Rinku Singh, Sunil Narine, Anukul Roy, Kartik Tyagi, Varun Chakaravarthy, Saurabh DubeyMumbai Indians Impact Subs: Shardul Thakur, Mayank Rawat, Robin Minz, Krish Bhagat, AM GhazanfarKolkata Knight Riders Impact subs: Finn Allen, Vaibhav Arora, Ramandeep Singh, Tejasvi Dahiya, Rahul Tripathi
Article Summary: Kolkata knight riders captain ajinkya rahane won the toss and opted to bowl first. Mumbai received a major boost with skipper hardik pandya returning to the playing xi. Suryakumar yadav also returned to the side. Kkr need a victory to keep their playoff hopes alive.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Another flopshow! Rohit Sharma, Suryakumar Yadav fail again as MI collapse vs KKR
Article Text:
Rohit Sharma and Suryakumar Yadav (ANI Photos)

NEW DELHI: Mumbai Indians once again found themselves battling batting failures in IPL 2026, and this time the spotlight firmly fell on senior stars Rohit Sharma and Suryakumar Yadav during the crucial clash against Kolkata Knight Riders at Eden Gardens on Wednesday.In a must-win game for pride, MI managed only 147/8 in 20 overs after being asked to bat first by KKR captain Ajinkya Rahane.Once again, the experienced batting core failed to deliver when the team needed stability and momentum.Rohit’s innings lasted just 13 balls for 15 runs. While the scorecard may not look disastrous at first glance, the former MI captain never looked settled and threw away his wicket at a stage when Mumbai desperately needed someone to anchor the innings.His dismissal left MI reeling at 23/3 inside four overs, putting massive pressure on the middle order.Then came another frustrating chapter for Suryakumar Yadav. The stylish batter smashed a quick 15 off six balls but failed to convert his start yet again.In a season where consistency has completely deserted him, another cameo only added to MI’s growing frustrations. For a player regarded as one of the most destructive T20 batters in the world, his IPL 2026 returns have been hugely disappointing.Suryakumar has now scored only 210 runs in 12 innings this season at an average of 17.50. Despite maintaining a healthy strike rate, his inability to play impactful knocks has badly hurt Mumbai’s campaign.The collapse against KKR once again exposed Mumbai’s biggest issue this season: their star players have simply failed to deliver consistently.And with MI already out of playoff contention, the criticism surrounding Rohit and Suryakumar is only going to grow louder.
Article Summary: Rohit sharma and suryakumar yadav again fail to deliver in ipl 2026. Mumbai indians managed only 147/8 in 20 overs against kolkata knight riders. Rohit's innings lasted just 13 balls for 15 runs. Surykumar has now scored only 210 runs in 12 innings this season at 17.50.

Article Title: Pep Guardiola responds as Manchester City consider naming new Etihad stand after him in incredible tribute
Article Text:
Pep Guardiola responds as Manchester City consider renaming new Etihad Stadium stand in his honour

Manchester City supporters have reportedly pushed for the North Stand to be named after Guardiola

Guardiola insists memories matter more than permanent tributes

Guardiola reflected emotionally on departures and final moments

Manchester City are preparing for life after Guardiola

Fans tribute to Pep Guardiola coach of Manchester City 1000th game during the English Premier League soccer match between Manchester City and Liverpool in Manchester, England, Sunday, Nov. 9, 2025. (AP Photo/Jon Super)

Pep Guardiola says the memories created during his decade at Manchester City matter far more to him than any permanent tribute, even as growing reports suggest the club are considering naming the newly expanded North Stand after him.The discussion has intensified following widespread reports that Guardiola is preparing to leave Manchester City this summer, bringing an end to one of the most successful managerial eras English football has ever witnessed.While there has still been no official confirmation from either Guardiola or Manchester City, reports emerging on Monday night claimed the Spaniard plans to step away a year before his current contract expires, despite publicly maintaining that he still has another season remaining on his deal.That growing expectation surrounding Guardiola’s departure has now triggered conversations about how Manchester City should honour the manager who transformed the club’s modern history.According to reporting from The Sun, discussions are already underway regarding the possibility of renaming the Etihad Stadium’s newly redeveloped North Stand after Guardiola.The newly expanded North Stand at Manchester City’s Etihad Stadium, which adds approximately 7,900 seats and increases the venue’s capacity to more than 60,000, is scheduled to officially open on Sunday during the club’s final home game of the season, adding further symbolism to the timing of the discussions.SunSport reported that naming the stand after Guardiola is considered increasingly likely behind the scenes as the club prepares for what could become an emotional farewell.Manchester City have already immortalised several modern club legends with statues outside the Etihad Stadium, including Sergio Agüero, Vincent Kompany, David Silva and Kevin De Bruyne.Guardiola’s impact on the club, however, extends beyond any individual player from the modern era.Since arriving at Manchester City in 2016, the 55-year-old has overseen one of the most dominant periods any English club has experienced, winning 20 major trophies across ten years in charge.His haul includes six Premier League titles, one UEFA Champions League trophy, three FA Cups, five League Cups, three Community Shields, one UEFA Super Cup and one FIFA Club World Cup.Beyond the silverware itself, Guardiola reshaped Manchester City’s tactical identity and helped establish the club as one of the defining football powers of the modern era.Despite speculation surrounding the North Stand tribute, Pep Guardiola appeared visibly uncomfortable focusing on personal honours when questioned ahead of Manchester City’s trip to Bournemouth, instead reflecting more emotionally on the lasting significance of the relationships and memories built during his years at the club rather than physical tributes attached to his name.“I have no idea about that! No, no, no. They don’t have to do anything, honestly,” Guardiola said.“The important thing in our lives is that when you look back you say, ‘Wow’ and with the biggest smile.“When you’re old and you’re a grandfather you say, ‘Ah my life’ and you can laugh about the memories. And that is the most important thing in life.”Even while speculation around his future intensified, Guardiola continued teasing reporters about the possibility of staying longer at Manchester City.“And whatever happens in this part of the season, and when I extend my Manchester City contract two more year, after that look back and say, ‘Ah how nice it has been!’“That’s the most important thing, by far. And I’m pretty sure most people we lived with in this time together, we can feel that.”Even while making those remarks, Guardiola continued publicly joking about potentially extending his contract, despite the increasing belief inside the club that his departure is now approaching quickly.when asked directly about what his own farewell could look like, Guardiola again insisted: “Next. I’ve said it so many times – I have one more year.”Part of Guardiola’s emotional tone throughout the press conference also centred around other expected departures within the Manchester City squad.He specifically referenced Bernardo Silva and John Stones, both of whom are also expected to leave the club this summer.“Bernardo can feel that and John can feel it. We spoke about last days and said, ‘What a time we’ve lived,’” Guardiola said.“When you are an old, old grandfather and you look back and see how your life was, you can laugh for the memories.“That is the most important thing in life. And we can do that, whatever happens in this part of the season.”Guardiola also briefly acknowledged that Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola would be managing at the Vitality Stadium for the final time before his own expected departure this summer.“There are always last games for many people,” Guardiola said.“I’m pretty sure that Andoni will get the appreciation for the job he has done.”According to current reports, Guardiola’s exit could become official shortly after Manchester City’s final home fixture against Aston Villa.The club are also reportedly planning a major open-top bus parade on Monday to celebrate Guardiola’s achievements and Manchester City’s domestic success across the decade.The planned route is expected to begin in Manchester’s Northern Quarter before concluding outside the Colin Bell Stand reception area at the Etihad Stadium.Meanwhile, former Guardiola assistant and ex-Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has already emerged as one of the leading candidates to replace him if the departure is formally confirmed.Whether the North Stand ultimately carries Guardiola’s name or not, the wider discussion itself reflects the scale of his influence at Manchester City.Very few managers leave behind an era so dominant that supporters begin debating permanent architectural tributes while they are still technically in the job.
Article Summary: Pep guardiola responds as manchester city consider renaming new etihad stadium stand in his honour. Manchester city supporters have reportedly pushed for the north stand to be named after guardiola. Guardiola insists memories matter more than permanent tributes. Guardiola says bernardo silva and john stones will leave the club this summer.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Heinrich Klaasen overtakes Sai Sudharsan, Shubman Gill and Virat Kohli to reclaim top spot
Article Text:
Sunrisers Hyderabad's Heinrich Klaasen (ANI Photo)

IPL 2026 Orange Cap standings after CSK vs SRH match

Pos Player Runs M Ave. SR 100s/50s 1 Heinrich Klaasen (SRH) 555 13 50.45 155.89 0/5 2 Sai Sudharsan (GT) 554 13 46.17 157.83 1/6 3 Shubman Gill (GT) 552 13 46.00 160.46 0/5 4 Virat Kohli (RCB) 542 13 54.20 164.74 1/4 5 KL Rahul (DC) 533 13 44.42 171.93 1/4

NEW DELHI: Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday booked their spot in the IPL 2026 playoffs with a five-wicket victory over Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. The chase was anchored by Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen , with the duo adding a match-winning 75 runs for the third wicket.Klaasen contributed a brisk 47 off 26 balls, striking two sixes and six fours. The knock took his tally to 555 runs from 13 matches, lifting the SRH batter to the top of the IPL 2026 Orange Cap standings, one run ahead of second-placed Sai Sudharsan of Gujarat Titans.Klaasen has scored his runs at an average of 50.45 and a strike rate of 155.89, with five half-centuries to his name.Sudharsan’s 554 runs have also come from 13 matches and include one century and six fifties.GT captain Shubman Gill is third in the race with 552 runs, just three behind Klaasen, underlining how close the Orange Cap contest has become. Gill has also registered five fifties in 13 innings.Virat Kohli of Royal Challengers Bengaluru is fourth with 542 runs from 13 matches, scored at an average of 54.20 and a strike rate of 164.74, including one century and four fifties.KL Rahul of Delhi Capitals rounds off the top five with 533 runs from 13 matches. He has scored at a strike rate of 171.93, with one century and four fifties.With only 22 runs separating the top-ranked batter and the player in fifth place, the Orange Cap race remains one of the closest contests of IPL 2026.
Article Summary: Sunrisers hyderabad booked their spot in the ipl 2026 playoffs with a five-wicket victory over chennai super kings at chepauk. The chase was anchored by ishan kishan and heinrich klaasen, with the duo adding a match-winning 75 runs for the third wicket.

Article Title: Who is Ines Garcia? Lamine Yamal linked with Spanish influencer after Kings League livestream moment sparks dating rumors
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal (Image Via Getty)

Lamine Yamal and Ines Garcia rumors grow after vacation sighting and Kings League livestream moment

Something new is being talked about around Lamine Yamal, and this time it is not about football. The young Barcelona star is now being linked with a social media influencer named Ines Garcia. Fans started noticing small things online, and slowly, those little details turned into big speculation. From following each other to liking posts, people believe there could be something going on between them.This comes not long after Yamal was linked to Nicki Nicole. While nothing was ever clearly confirmed about that situation, the latest rumors have quickly taken over social media. According to influencer Javi Hoyos, Yamal recently took a short break after Barcelona’s win over Getafe. What caught attention is that Ines Garcia was also said to be part of that same trip.The story picked up more attention when details about the vacation came out. As per Javi Hoyos, Yamal spent time with friends at La Cupula del Garraf, a popular seaside spot near Barcelona. It is being said that Ines Garcia was also there with the group. While there are no clear photos or direct proof, fans quickly connected the dots after hearing about the trip.At first, it seemed like just another online rumor. But then something unexpected happened during a livestream related to the Kings League. During a casual video call, Yamal’s close friend Sohaib and his cousin Mohamed were talking when the name “Ines” suddenly came up. The reaction that followed made things more interesting. There was a brief pause and an awkward moment, which many viewers felt looked like something private had been mentioned by mistake.That short clip spread quickly, and fans began to believe there might be some truth behind the rumors. Still, it is important to note that neither Yamal nor Ines Garcia has said anything publicly about this. There has been no confirmation from either side.Right now, everything is based on small clues. Social media activity, a shared location, and one unexpected moment during a livestream have all added to the buzz. But without a clear statement, it remains only speculation.For now, Lamine Yamal continues to focus on his football, while fans keep watching closely. Whether this turns out to be real or not, it has already become one of the most talked-about off-field stories around the young star.
Article Summary: Lamine yamal and ines garcia rumors grow after vacation sighting and kings league livestream moment. Fans started noticing small things online, and slowly, those little details turned into big speculation. From following each other to liking posts, people believe there could be something going on between them.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: Ipl Ticket Scam: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

Watch Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy Devdutt Padikkal press conference: Chinnaswamy pitch, Tim David’s power & RCB’s batting strategy

RCB register their second win

Poll Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right.

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) by 43 runs. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries. Rcb set a new record for highest total in ipl 2026 with 250/3.

Article Title: Shattering records and cultivating future stars
Article Text:
Mayura Shanbaug

Ashish Kumar Srivastava - MD and CEO of PNB MetLife

Sameer Bansal - Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife

Chirag Shetty - Asian Games Gold Medalist & JBC 2023 mentor

The 7th PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide, earning global recognition and fostering a culture of resilience and determination in aspiring badminton starsIn a spectacular display of badminton prowess and youthful enthusiasm, the 7th edition of the PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship (JBC) etched its name in the annals of sporting history. Celebrating a staggering participation of 8257 young champions from across India, the championship not only broke its own record set in 2022 but also clinched the title of the ‘Most kids participating in a Badminton Championship in multiple cities’ as recognised by the World Record Certification Agency (WRCA).The grand finale unfolded at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton. The event, graced by chief guests Chirag Shetty and Satwik Rankireddy, Asian Games Gold Medalists and JBC 2023 mentors, was a true celebration of the sport’s rising stars.The 10-city extravaganza, spanning the length and breadth of the country, showcased the unwavering commitment of PNB MetLife in nurturing young talents in the badminton arena. With participants exceeding 8200, it’s evident that the PNB MetLife JBC has become a beacon for aspiring shuttlers, highlighting the deep-seated passion for badminton among the diverse and talented youth of India.Beyond the glitz and glamour of the record-breaking numbers, the championship holds a special place in the hearts of those at the helm. Ashish Kumar Srivastava, MD and CEO of PNB MetLife, expressed pride in not just surpassing their own world record but also in contributing to India’s glory on the international badminton stage. The championship, he emphasized, is not merely a competition but a significant milestone in creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem.This edition of the JBC saw a strategic partnership with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, who served as mentors for the young talents. Sameer Bansal, Chief Distribution Officer of PNB MetLife, acknowledged the pivotal role played by these champions in inspiring the next generation of badminton stars. The focus, according to Bansal, is on unleashing the latent potential of young shuttlers and preparing them for global excellence.The Delhi chapter of the championship witnessed some nail-biting action with over 1000 participants competing fiercely across various categories. From Ananya Talyan’s stellar performance in Girls Singles Under 9 to Divyansh Rawat’s triumph in Boys Singles Under 17, the young talents left no shuttle unturned in their quest for victory.The results from the Delhi leg not only showcased the raw talent but also highlighted the championship’s commitment to breaking barriers. The PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship is not just about records; it’s about fostering a culture of healthy living, determination, and resilience among the future champions of the sport.In the words of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, the championship serves as an invaluable platform.---------------------------------------------------------------As we celebrate the successful culmination of the 7th edition of PNB MetLife Junior Badminton Championship , we take pride in surpassing our own world record for highest participation and for being recognized by World Record Certification Agency. Beyond the records, JBC represents a significant milestone in our mission to lay the groundwork for India’ s glory and success on the international badminton stage by creating a pan-India badminton ecosystem that nurtures champions at the grassroots levelThis year has been especially remarkable for PNB MetLife JBC as we joined hands with world champions Chirag Shetty and Satwiksairaj Rankireddy as JBC Mentors for the young talents associated with this tournament. They have played a pivotal role in inspiring young shuttlers to dream big and elevate their game and skills. We are eager for the next edition to unfold in our journey of unveiling the latent badminton potential across our nation and preparing them for global excellenceIt’s inspiring to witness the boundless talent and enthusiasm within our young athletes. My journey as JBC mentor has been incredibly fulfilling, as I got the opportunity to guide these budding champions and witness the journey of these young badminton stars. This championship is more than a competition; it is a platform that nurtures dreams, ignites aspirations, and, I believe, it is laying the foundation for future gold medalists in the makingTournaments like these serve as an invaluable platform for nurturing and harnessing the potential of our country’s young badminton stars. Witnessing the enthusiasm, passion, and skill displayed by these emerging shuttlers reinforces the belief that our country has an immense reservoir of talent. My association as a JBC mentor has been a source of immense pride, particularly given the role that the championship is playing in creating an incredible platform that is serving as a powerful catalyst, empowering young players and bolstering their confidence to become future champions
Article Summary: The 7th pnb metlife junior badminton championship shattered records with over 8,200 young talent nationwide. The grand finale unfolded at the indira gandhi indoor stadium in new delhi, where the air was thick with competition, camaraderie, and the unmistakable passion for badminton.

Article Title: IPL 2026: KKR beat MI by four wickets to stay alive as playoff race heads into final round
Article Text:
KKR vs MI (ANI Photo)

Brief scores:

Kolkata Knight Riders kept their IPL 2026 playoff hopes alive with a hard-fought four-wicket victory over Mumbai Indians in a rain-interrupted clash at Eden Gardens on Wednesday.After winning the toss and opting to bowl first, KKR bowlers quickly put Mumbai under pressure. MI’s batting lineup once again struggled badly, slipping to 41/4 inside the powerplay after early wickets of Rohit Sharma, Ryan Rickelton and Suryakumar Yadav.Captain Hardik Pandya attempted to rebuild the innings with a cautious 26, while Tilak Varma added 20. The duo stitched together a slow but important 43-run partnership off 49 balls to steady Mumbai after the collapse.However, it was all-rounder Corbin Bosch who gave MI a fighting total with a quick unbeaten 32 off just 18 deliveries. His late cameo helped Mumbai reach 147/8 in their 20 overs.KKR’s bowling effort was shared evenly, with Saurabh Dubey, Cameron Green and Kartik Tyagi picking up two wickets each, while veteran spinner Sunil Narine kept things tight in the middle overs.Chasing 148, Kolkata lost a few wickets early but experienced batter Manish Pandey played a composed knock of 45 to anchor the innings. He received strong support from Rovman Powell , who smashed 40 during a crucial 64-run partnership that shifted the game firmly in KKR’s favour.Despite a few late wickets, KKR crossed the target in 18.5 overs, with Rinku Singh hitting the winning runs to seal an important victory.MI: 147 for 8 in 20 overs (Corbin Bosch 32 not out, Hardik Pandya 26, Tilak Varma 20; Saurabh Dubey 2/34, Cameron Green 2/23)KKR: 148 for 6 in 18.5 overs (Manish Pandey 45, Rovman Powell 40; Corbin Bosch 3/30).
Article Summary: Kolkata knight riders kept their ipl 2026 playoff hopes alive with a hard-fought four-wicket victory over mumbai indians in a rain-interrupted clash at eden gardens on wednesday. Corbin bosch gave mi a fighting total with a quick unbeaten 32 off just 18 deliveries. Manish pandey played a composed knock of 45 to anchor the innings.
